Imagine you work harder than anyone else. You arrive early. You stay late. You do everything right. But you are still treated differently. You are still excluded. You are still overlooked. People doubt you because of who you are. They make you feel small. They make you feel invisible. They make you want to give up. But what if you did not give up? What if you kept fighting? What if you proved them wrong? This is the story of Jordan—a story of discrimination, determination, and triumph.
